ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If the stroke has an outline, this will mean the stroke color is the outline color, and the background color is the pen stroke's fill color. If the pen does not have an outline then the pen color is the stroke color. The Fill Style setting applies to the fill style of the enclosed shape, not of the line itself. The line can only have solid fill.
ast.target: 如果笔触有轮廓，则意味着笔触颜色即为轮廓颜色，而背景颜色即为笔触的填充颜色。如果画笔没有轮廓，则画笔颜色即为笔触颜色。“填充样式”设置适用于封闭形状的填充样式，而非线条本身。线条只能使用实心填充。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to simulate pressure based on velocity.
ast.target: 是否根据速度模拟压力。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The distance to taper. If set to true, the taper will be the total length of the stroke.
ast.target: 渐变距离。如果设为 true，渐变将贯穿整个笔触长度。

ast.name: content
ast.source: The user will provide you with a text prompt. Your task is to generate a mermaid diagram based on the prompt. Use the graph, sequenceDiagram, flowchart or classDiagram types based on what best fits the request. Return a single message containing only the mermaid diagram in a codeblock. Avoid the use of `()` parenthesis in the mermaid script.
ast.target: 用户将提供一段文本提示。您的任务是根据该提示生成 Mermaid 图表。根据最适合请求的类型，使用 graph、sequenceDiagram、flowchart 或 classDiagram。返回的消息中应仅包含代码块中的 Mermaid 图表。避免在 Mermaid 脚本中使用 `()` 圆括号。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Return a single message containing only the mermaid diagram in a codeblock.
ast.target: 返回的消息中应仅包含代码块中的 Mermaid 图表。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
type ConnectionPoint = "top" | "bottom" | "left" | "right" | null
When null is passed as ConnectionPoint then Excalidraw will automatically decide
numberOfPoints is the number of points on the line. Default is 0 i.e. line will only have a start and end point.
ArrowHead: "arrow"|"bar"|"circle"|"circle_outline"|"triangle"|"triangle_outline"|"diamond"|"diamond_outline"|null
ast.target:
type ConnectionPoint = "top" | "bottom" | "left" | "right" | null
当 ConnectionPoint 传入 null 时，Excalidraw 将自动决定
numberOfPoints 是线条上的点数。默认值为 0，即线条仅有起点和终点。
ArrowHead: "arrow"|"bar"|"circle"|"circle_outline"|"triangle"|"triangle_outline"|"diamond"|"diamond_outline"|null

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns an 8 character long random id

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts a HEX color to an RGB number array. #FF0000 to [255,0,0]
ast.target: 将 HEX 颜色转换为 RGB 数字数组。例如 #FF0000 转换为 [255,0,0]

ast.target: 将 HSL 数字数组转换为 RGB 数字数组。例如 [0,100,50] 转换为 [255,0,0]

ast.source: Converts an RGB number array to an HSL number array. [255,0,0] to [0,100,50]
ast.target: 将 RGB 数字数组转换为 HSL 数字数组。例如 [255,0,0] 转换为 [0,100,50]

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts a CSS color name to its HEX color equivalent. 'White' to #FFFFFF
ast.target: 将 CSS 颜色名称转换为对应的 HEX 颜色值。例如 'White' 转换为 #FFFFFF

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns a new instance of ExcalidrawAutomate.
ast.target: 返回 ExcalidrawAutomate 的新实例。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
This asynchronous function should be awaited. It retrieves the filepath to a new file, taking into account the attachments preference settings in Obsidian. If the attachment folder doesn't exist, it creates it. The function returns the complete file path to the file. If the provided filename already exists, the function will append '_[number]' before the extension to generate a unique filename.Prompts the user with a dialog to select new file action.
- create markdown file
- create excalidraw file
- cancel action
The new file will be relative to this.targetView.file.path, unless parentFile is provided. If shouldOpenNewFile is true, the new file will be opened in a workspace leaf. targetPane controls which leaf will be used for the new file.
Returns the TFile for the new file or null if the user cancelled the action.
type PaneTarget = "active-pane"|"new-pane"|"popout-window"|"new-tab"|"md-properties";
ast.target:
此异步函数应被 await。它会根据 Obsidian 的附件偏好设置获取新文件的路径。如果附件文件夹不存在，它将创建该文件夹。函数返回文件的完整路径。如果提供的文件名已存在，函数将在扩展名前附加“_[数字]”以生成唯一文件名。弹出对话框提示用户选择新文件操作：
- 创建 Markdown 文件
- 创建 Excalidraw 文件
- 取消操作
除非提供了 parentFile，否则新文件路径将相对于 this.targetView.file.path。如果 shouldOpenNewFile 为 true，新文件将在工作区叶片中打开。targetPane 控制用于新文件的叶片。
返回新文件的 TFile，如果用户取消操作则返回 null。
type PaneTarget = "active-pane"|"new-pane"|"popout-window"|"new-tab"|"md-properties";

ast.name: desc
ast.source: @returns the last recorded pointer position on the Excalidraw canvas
ast.target: @returns Excalidraw 画布上最后记录的指针位置

ast.name: desc
ast.source: @returns the center position of the current view in Excalidraw coordinates
ast.target: @returns Excalidraw 坐标系下当前视图的中心位置

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns the active sidepanel tab for the given script, or null if none exists. If scriptName is omitted the function checks ea.activeScript. At most one sidepanel tab may be open per script. The returned ExcalidrawSidepanelTab may be hosted by a different ExcalidrawAutomate instance — compare sidepanelTab.getHostEA() === ea to determine ownership. Useful to detect or reuse an existing tab instead of creating a new one.
ast.target: 返回给定脚本的活动侧边面板标签页，如果不存在则返回 null。如果省略 scriptName，函数将检查 ea.activeScript。每个脚本最多只能打开一个侧边面板标签页。返回的 ExcalidrawSidepanelTab 可能由不同的 ExcalidrawAutomate 实例托管 —— 可通过比较 sidepanelTab.getHostEA() === ea 来确定归属。这对于检测或重用现有标签页而非创建新标签页非常有用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Creates this EA instance's sidepanel tab; use the returned ExcalidrawSidepanelTab (setContent/setTitle, onOpen/onClose/onFocus, contentEl) to build the UI and lifecycle hooks.
In case the script wants to replace the sidepanel tab it created earlier, call closeSidepanelTab() first, then createSidepanelTab() again.
ast.target:
创建此 EA 实例的侧边面板标签页；使用返回的 ExcalidrawSidepanelTab (setContent/setTitle, onOpen/onClose/onFocus, contentEl) 来构建 UI 和生命周期钩子。
如果脚本想要替换之前创建的侧边面板标签页，请先调用 closeSidepanelTab()，然后再调用 createSidepanelTab()。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns the WorkspaceLeaf hosting the Excalidraw sidepanel view, or null if the sidepanel is not present.
ast.target: 返回托管 Excalidraw 侧边面板视图的 WorkspaceLeaf，如果侧边面板不存在则返回 null。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Queues a one-time skip marker so sidepanel persisted restoration will not re-run the script. Intended for startup race conditions where a script is started from Command Palette/hotkey before the sidepanel has opened. If scriptName is omitted the function uses ea.activeScript. The marker is queued only when getSidepanelLeaf() is null; returns true when queued, otherwise false.
ast.target: 排队一个一次性的“跳过标记”，使侧边面板持久化恢复时不会重新运行该脚本。主要用于解决启动时的竞争条件（例如脚本在侧边面板打开前已由命令面板或热键启动）。如果省略 scriptName，函数将使用 ea.activeScript。仅在 getSidepanelLeaf() 为 null 时标记才会入队；成功入队返回 true，否则返回 false。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Toggles the Excalidraw sidepanel visibility when the sidepanel is hosted in the left or right workspace split. If the sidepanel is not attached to a left/right sidebar, no action is taken.
ast.target: 当侧边面板托管在左侧或右侧工作区分割区时，切换 Excalidraw 侧边面板的可见性。如果侧边面板未附着在左/右侧栏，则不执行任何操作。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Pins the active script's sidepanel tab so it persists across Obsidian restarts and returns it.
ast.target: 固定活动脚本的侧边面板标签页，使其在 Obsidian 重启后依然存在，并将其返回。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Parses raw text through targetView.excalidrawData using the same parsing pipeline as ExcalidrawData (including transclusion resolution, link brackets, and link/url prefixes from frontmatter). Works only when ea.targetView is set and loaded.
ast.target: 通过 targetView.excalidrawData 解析原始文本，使用与 ExcalidrawData 相同的解析管线（包括嵌入解析、链接括号以及来自 frontmatter 的链接/URL 前缀）。仅在设置并加载了 ea.targetView 时生效。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Generates a new Obsidian Leaf following Excalidraw plugin settings such as open in Main Workspace or not, open in adjacent pane if available, etc.
@param origo: the currently active leaf, the origin of the new leaf
@param targetPane: type PaneTarget = "active-pane"|"new-pane"|"popout-window"|"new-tab"|"md-properties";
ast.target:
根据 Excalidraw 插件设置（例如是否在主工作区打开、是否在相邻面板打开等）生成一个新的 Obsidian 叶片 (Leaf)。
@param origo: 当前活动叶片，新叶片的来源
@param targetPane: type PaneTarget = "active-pane"|"new-pane"|"popout-window"|"new-tab"|"md-properties";

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Returns the current device type. Possible values are:
type DeviceType = {
  isDesktop: boolean,
  isPhone: boolean,
  isTablet: boolean,
  isMobile: boolean,
  isLinux: boolean,
  isMacOS: boolean,
  isWindows: boolean,
  isIOS: boolean,
  isAndroid: boolean
};
ast.target:
返回当前设备类型。可能的值为：
type DeviceType = {
  isDesktop (桌面端): boolean,
  isPhone (手机): boolean,
  isTablet (平板): boolean,
  isMobile (移动端): boolean,
  isLinux: boolean,
  isMacOS: boolean,
  isWindows: boolean,
  isIOS: boolean,
  isAndroid: boolean
};

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Checks if the folder exists, if not, creates it.
ast.target: 检查文件夹是否存在，如果不存在则创建它。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Checks if the filepath already exists, if so, returns a new filepath with a number appended to the filename else returns the filepath as provided.
ast.target: 检查文件路径是否已存在。如果已存在，则返回文件名后附数字的新路径；否则按原样返回文件路径。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Grabs the codeblock content from the supplied markdown string. Returns an array of dictionaries with the codeblock content and type
ast.target: 从提供的 Markdown 字符串中抓取代码块内容。返回一个包含代码块内容和类型的字典数组。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts a string to a DataURL.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Sets Excalidraw in the targetView to view-mode
ast.target: 将 targetView 中的 Excalidraw 设置为查看模式

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Splits a file path into its components.
ast.target: 将文件路径拆分为各个组成部分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Compresses String to a Base64 string using LZString
ast.target: 使用 LZString 将字符串压缩为 Base64 字符串

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Decompresses a base 64 compressed string using LZString
ast.target: 使用 LZString 解压 Base64 格式的压缩字符串

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The TFile of the currently running script
ast.target: 当前正在运行脚本的 TFile 对象

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Denotes an excalidraw file. If key is not present, the file will not be recognized as an Excalidraw file. Valid values are 'parsed' and 'raw'
ast.target: 标识 Excalidraw 文件。如果不存在此键，该文件将不被识别为 Excalidraw 文件。有效值为 'parsed' (已解析) 和 'raw' (原始)

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Specifies how Excalidraw should open by default. Valid values are: view|zen
ast.target: 指定 Excalidraw 的默认打开方式。有效值为：view (查看模式)|zen (禅模式)

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The value of this field will be executed as javascript code using the Script Engine environment. Use this to initiate custom actions or logic when loading your drawing.
ast.target: 此字段的值将作为 JavaScript 代码在脚本引擎环境中执行。使用此功能可在加载绘图时启动自定义操作或逻辑。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default value (if not set) is true, if set to false internal links will not be exported to SVG images and PDFs.
ast.target: 默认值（如果未设置）为 true；如果设为 false，内部链接将不会导出到 SVG 图像和 PDF 中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this key is present the file will be opened as a markdown file in the editor
ast.target: 如果存在此键，文件将在编辑器中作为 Markdown 文件打开

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Override autoexport settings for this file. Valid values are
none
both
png
svg
ast.target:
覆盖此文件的自动导出设置。有效值为：
none (无)
both (两者)
png
svg

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this key is present the drawing will be handled as a mask to crop an image.
ast.target: 如果存在此键，绘图将被视为用于裁剪图像的遮罩 (mask)。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 不支持 GPOS 查找类型 3

ast.name: error
ast.target: 不支持 GPOS 查找类型 4

ast.name: error
ast.target: 不支持 GPOS 查找类型 5

ast.name: error
ast.target: 不支持 GPOS 查找类型 6

ast.name: error
ast.target: 不支持 GPOS 查找类型 7

ast.name: error
ast.target: 不支持 GPOS 查找类型 8

ast.name: error
ast.target: 不支持 GPOS 查找类型 9

ast.name: error
ast.source: new drawing not recognized as an excalidraw file
ast.target: 新绘图未被识别为 Excalidraw 文件

ast.name: message
ast.source: targetView not set, or no longer active. Use setView before calling this function
ast.target: targetView 未设置或不再处于活动状态。调用此函数前请先使用 setView

ast.name: message
ast.source: this function is not available on Obsidian Mobile
ast.target: 此函数在 Obsidian 移动端不可用

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tapering options for the start of the line.
ast.target: 线条起始处的渐变选项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tapering options for the end of the line.
ast.target: 线条末尾处的渐变选项。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 关于 Obsidian Publish 支持的视频
